query: SELECT c.id, c.nome, c.tipo, c.gestorId, c.lojaId, l.gestorId as lojaGestorId FROM colaboradores c LEFT JOIN lojas l ON c.lojaId = l.id WHERE c.ativo = true ORDER BY c.tipo, c.nome LIMIT 20;
